hero.enterpriseSecurityDesc: End-to-end encryption with per-organization data isolation

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to automate your document processing workflow. Built with modern technology for maximum performance and reliability.
features.intelligentOcrDesc: Advanced AI processes BCP, Yape, and custom receipts with 99%+ accuracy. Automatic classification and data extraction.
features.whatsappIntegrationDesc: Submit documents directly via WhatsApp. Real-time processing with instant notifications and status updates.
features.googleSheetsSyncDesc: Automatic export to Google Sheets. Real-time data synchronization for seamless accounting workflows.
features.awsServerlessDesc: Scalable cloud infrastructure. Auto-scaling Lambda functions with 99.9% uptime guarantee.
features.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Real multi-tenant architecture with complete per-organization data isolation. End-to-end encryption.
features.teamManagementDesc: Role-based access control. Organization management with user permissions and audit trails.
features.customParsersDesc: Build custom parsers for any document type. Adaptable AI engine that learns your business formats.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Power your business with the right amount of rocket fuel. Start free and scale as you grow.
pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for testing and small projects
pricing.customSolutionDesc: Contact our team for enterprise-grade features, custom integrations, and volume pricing for large organizations.
